songs.title: I Knew You Were Trouble (Taylor's Version)
feed: “I Knew You Were Trouble (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“I Knew You Were Trouble (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 85 spots to #1.
“I Knew You Were Trouble (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 85 spots to #1.
“I Knew You Were Trouble (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 642% to 371 points.
“I Knew You Were Trouble (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift is the biggest position gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 85 spots to #1.
“I Knew You Were Trouble (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 250 streams units.

songs.title: Red (Taylor's Version)
feed: “Red (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift reenters Personal Hot 100 at #2.
“Red (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 74 airplay units.
“Red (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 348,936 total units.
